title: mentha × digenea
intro: Mentha × digenea, also known as pineapple mint or pineapple spearmint, is a hybrid plant between Mentha suaveolens and Mentha × gracilis. It is a hardy perennial herb that is native to Western Europe, and it is characterized by its distinctive pineapple-like aroma and flavor. The medicinal properties of Mentha × digenea include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat digestive issues and relieve headaches. The health benefits of this plant include reducing nausea and improving digestion, and it can be consumed as a tea, used in cooking, or prepared as an herbal infusion.
